faqs.question: How do I book a stay at Villa Volpe?
faqs.answer: You can book in two ways. Direct Booking (recommended): email us at villavolpeorta@gmail.com with your dates, number of guests, and any special requests. You'll enjoy a 15% discount off the Airbnb price. Via Airbnb: visit our Airbnb listing for the convenience and support of the platform.

faqs.question: What are the cancellation policies?
faqs.answer: Cancel up to 21 days before check-in for a full refund of your deposit. After this deadline, the deposit is non-refundable. We understand plans can change, so please contact us as soon as possible if you need to modify your reservation.

faqs.question: Can I change my reservation dates after booking?
faqs.answer: Yes, date changes are welcome subject to availability. Please contact us as soon as possible. Note that changes may be subject to additional charges depending on the season and availability.

faqs.question: What is the maximum number of guests?
faqs.answer: Villa Volpe accommodates up to 4 guests in 2 double bedrooms. This ensures ample space and a quality stay for everyone.

faqs.question: Is Villa Volpe suitable for children?
faqs.answer: Yes, Villa Volpe is family-friendly with secure premises and child-friendly amenities. However, we advise parents to always supervise their children, especially around the lake and outdoor areas.

faqs.question: What is the pet policy?
faqs.answer: We welcome one small to medium-sized pet per stay. There is a €120 cleaning fee per stay. Pets must be well-behaved and house-trained, and owners are responsible for any damage.

faqs.question: Are linens and towels included?
faqs.answer: Yes, all bedding and towels are included and ready upon your arrival.

faqs.question: What is the self check-in process?
faqs.answer: Once your booking is confirmed, you'll receive a detailed email with instructions for self check-in, including how to access the property, locate the keys, and navigate the villa's amenities.

faqs.question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faqs.answer: Standard check-in is after 15:00 (3 PM). Check-out is at 10:00 (10 AM). If you need flexibility, please contact us in advance.

faqs.question: Where can I park my vehicle?
faqs.answer: Villa Volpe offers ample parking inside the property at no additional cost. During high season, only one car is allowed.

faqs.question: Can I walk to Orta San Giulio town center?
faqs.answer: The town center is about 1.3 km away. We strongly recommend driving — the road is quite busy and challenging for pedestrians.

faqs.question: Does Villa Volpe have Wi-Fi?
faqs.answer: Yes, free Wi-Fi is available throughout the property via a portable router that supports up to 10 devices simultaneously.

faqs.question: Is there air conditioning and heating?
faqs.answer: Yes, the property is equipped with air conditioning for both cooling and heating in all rooms.

faqs.question: Are there laundry facilities?
faqs.answer: Yes, a washing machine is available in a dedicated technical closet with usage instructions provided.

faqs.question: Can I swim in the lake?
faqs.answer: Villa Volpe has private lake access, ideal for swimming. An outdoor hot and cold shower is available. Lake Orta is one of the cleanest lakes in Italy.

faqs.question: Is the property accessible for people with disabilities?
faqs.answer: Yes, Villa Volpe is fully accessible: ramp entry, wheelchair-friendly corridors, adapted bathroom with handles and movable seat, and on request, a people-lifting system for lake access.

faqs.question: Is the tap water safe to drink?
faqs.answer: Yes, the tap water is safe and drinkable. Some guests prefer bottled water, which is available at local grocery stores.

faqs.question: Are parties or events allowed?
faqs.answer: No. Villa Volpe is an oasis of relaxation. Parties and events are not permitted. Please maintain minimal noise, especially in the evenings.

faqs.question: Can I use a BBQ?
faqs.answer: No. Barbecues and open flame devices are strictly prohibited for safety and compliance with local regulations.

faqs.question: How does garbage collection work?
faqs.answer: Please separate waste into categories: paper, plastic, metal, glass, organic, and general waste. Collection points are located near the parking area.
